narration: Science has a clearer story about autophagy than social media does.
visual_description: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about autophagy than social media does.

narration: Autophagy is your body's way of cleaning out damaged cells, recycling components for energy.
visual_description: Context visual: Autophagy is your body's way of cleaning out damaged cells, recycling components for energy.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Autophagy is your body's way of cleaning out damaged cells, recycling components for energy.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Autophagy is your body's way of cleaning out damaged cells, recycling components for energy.

narration: Without it, cells accumulate junk, leading to diseases like cancer and neurodegeneration.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Without it, cells accumulate junk, leading to diseases like cancer and neurodegeneration.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Without it, cells accumulate junk, leading to diseases like cancer and neurodegeneration.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Without it, cells accumulate junk, leading to diseases like cancer and neurodegeneration.

narration: Studies show fasting and exercise boost autophagy, enhancing longevity and health.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show fasting and exercise boost autophagy, enhancing longevity and health.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Studies show fasting and exercise boost autophagy, enhancing longevity and health.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies show fasting and exercise boost autophagy, enhancing longevity and health.

narration: But remember, balance is key—excessive autophagy can be harmful too.
visual_description: Payoff visual: But remember, balance is key—excessive autophagy can be harmful too.
